CustomObject.description: Platform Event published by the scan engine to push real-time progress updates to the metaMapperProgress LWC. One event is published per Queueable execution - not per node - to stay within the org daily Platform Event delivery limit. Suppressed automatically when the org exceeds 80% of the daily limit; the LWC falls back to polling in that case. Ref: ISP-6072
CustomObject.label: Dependency Scan Status
